scoring-irt-lines.rationale: NFR32 — scoring engine cognitive-load cap (~250 LOC). Solo-dev must be able to mind the whole auditable scoring engine end-to-end.

css-components-lines.rationale: NFR32 — total CSS body across components (~1500 LOC). Beyond this, design-system complexity exceeds solo-dev review budget.

app-modules-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — assessment SPA modules budget (~34 KB raw). Aligned with NFR21 vanilla-ES2022 + NFR33 zero-runtime-dep posture. Initial budget (30 KB) set in Epic 1; raised to 34 KB in Story 6.2 to accommodate Story 6.1 (full 6-stage reveal-stage dispatcher graduation + timings JSON consumption) plus Story 6.2 (FR22 per-item-difficulty breakdown — selectSession re-derivation + band lookup + difficulty-sentence render in result.js). test-hook.js is dev-time-only (activated by ?test=1; Story 3-7) — excluded from production-modules accounting. cite-this-page.js (Story 4-6) is methodology-corpus-only — injected by tools/build-methodology.mjs into static methodology pages, never loaded by the assessment SPA.

i18n-harness-bytes.rationale: NFR32 — i18n harness footprint (~15 KB raw). Locale loader is a runtime harness in Domain A; budget kept tight per NFR33.

methodology-pages-en.rationale: NFR32 — EN methodology corpus page count. Original ~30 corpus pages + ~5 glossary entries (Story 5.2) + ~2 tail-scene placeholders (Story 5.6) + headroom for v0.5→v1.0 editorial expansion.

methodology-pages-ru.rationale: NFR32 — RU methodology corpus page count (~30/locale). Mirrors EN budget; activates when Epic 7 lands RU content.

methodology-pages-pl.rationale: NFR32 — PL methodology corpus page count (~30/locale). Mirrors EN budget; activates when Epic 7 lands PL content.
